'''Groundborers''' were large machines used for creating tunnels manufactured by [[Akin-Dower]]. They were used to provide a quick shelter on dangerous worlds. A group of wealthy [[Naddist]]s purchased several for use in the [[Freedon Nadd Uprising]], where [[Warb Null]] attacked the city of [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]] on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] using modified versions of the Akin-Dower groundborers. After this attack, they were known as '''Onderonian War Machines'''.

{{Veh-stub}}
